targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(timestamp_interval, INTERVAL $__interval_s second) as time,
    metric, operation, cluster,
    sum(events_count) / greatest($__interval_s, 30) AS rps
FROM global_metric_service_latency_agg_30s
WHERE
    $__timeFilter(timestamp_interval)
    AND metric='service_latency'
    AND cluster='$cluster'
    AND service='history'
    -- AND namespace='ns.account'
GROUP BY time, metric, operation, cluster
ORDER BY time

/* Uncomment the namespace parts below in order to filter on a specific namespace */
SELECT
    $__timeInterval(timestamp_interval) as time,
    operation,
    sum(events_sum) / sum(events_count)/1000 as avg
FROM global_metric_service_latency_agg_30s
WHERE
    $__timeFilter(timestamp_interval)
    AND metric='service_latency'
    AND cluster = '$cluster'
    -- AND namespace='ns.account'
    AND service = 'history'
GROUP BY time, operation
-- , namespace
ORDER BY time

  namespace,
  quantileInterpolatedWeighted($quantile)(bucket, sum_bucket_events_count) as latency_ms

order by time asc

    AND cluster='$cluster'

targets.rawSql:
/* Uncomment the namespace parts below in order to filter on a specific namespace */
SELECT
    $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS time,
    -- namespace,
    avg(activity_info_size) AS activity_info_size,
    avg(buffered_events_size) AS buffered_events_size,
    avg(child_info_size) AS child_info_size,
    avg(execution_info_size) AS execution_info_size,
    avg(execution_state_size) AS execution_state_size,
    avg(history_size) AS history_size,
    avg(mutable_state_size) AS mutable_state_size,
    avg(request_cancel_info_size) AS request_cancel_info_size,
    avg(signal_info_size) AS signal_info_size,
    avg(signal_request_id_size) AS signal_request_id_size,
    avg(timer_info_size) AS timer_info_size,
    avg(chasm_total_size) AS chasm_size
FROM global_event_mutable_state_status
WHERE
    $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND cluster = '$cluster'
    AND operation='SessionStats'
    -- AND namespace='ns.account'
GROUP BY time -- , namespace
ORDER BY time

/* Uncomment the namespace parts below in order to filter on a specific namespace */
SELECT
    $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS time,
    -- namespace,
    quantile(${quantile})(activity_info_size) AS activity_info_size,
    quantile(${quantile})(buffered_events_size) AS buffered_events_size,
    quantile(${quantile})(child_info_size) AS child_info_size,
    quantile(${quantile})(execution_info_size) AS execution_info_size,
    quantile(${quantile})(execution_state_size) AS execution_state_size,
    quantile(${quantile})(history_size) AS history_size,
    quantile(${quantile})(mutable_state_size) AS mutable_state_size,
    quantile(${quantile})(request_cancel_info_size) AS request_cancel_info_size,
    quantile(${quantile})(signal_info_size) AS signal_info_size,
    quantile(${quantile})(signal_request_id_size) AS signal_request_id_size,
    quantile(${quantile})(timer_info_size) AS timer_info_size,
    quantile(${quantile})(chasm_total_size) AS chasm_size
FROM global_event_mutable_state_status
WHERE
    $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND cluster = '$cluster'
    AND operation='SessionStats'
    -- AND namespace='ns.account'
GROUP BY time -- , namespace
ORDER BY time

/* Uncomment the namespace parts below in order to filter on a specific namespace */
SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(timestamp_interval, INTERVAL $__interval_s second) as time,
    -- namespace
    sum(events_sum) / sum(events_count) as avg
FROM global_metric_task_count_agg_30s
WHERE
    $__timeFilter(timestamp_interval)
    AND cluster = '$cluster'
    -- AND namespace='prod.infra'
GROUP BY time
-- , namespace
ORDER BY time

/* Uncomment the namespace parts below in order to filter on a specific namespace */

    toStartOfInterval(timestamp_interval, INTERVAL $__interval_s second) as time,

FROM global_metric_history_count_agg_30s
WHERE
    $__timeFilter(timestamp_interval)
    AND metric='history_count'
    AND cluster = '$cluster'
    -- AND namespace='ns.account'
GROUP BY time
-- , namespace
ORDER BY time
